'''Reedox-stew''' was a kind of [[Stew/Legends|stew]].<ref name="Snare" /> Around [[10 BBY/Legends|10 BBY]],<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> a young [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] named [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] [[Diet/Legends|ate]] a bowl of reedox-stew in an [[Colony One infirmary|infirmary]] located in [[Peace City|Colony One]], the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]], after coming to be a cargo pilot for the [[Cult of The One and The All]], a bogus religious organization set up by the [[Besadii/Legends|Besadii]] [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] clan. Solo found the stew to be filling, but he was rather indifferent about it.<ref name="Snare" />

==Behind the scenes==
Reedox-stew was mentioned in ''[[The Paradise Snare]]'', a [[1997]] novel written by [[A. C. Crispin]] as the first book of [[The Han Solo Trilogy (hardcover)|''The Han Solo Trilogy'']].<ref name="Snare" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The Paradise Snare]]'' {{1st}}
